message:
Refactor TUI panels to use semantic_panel_block and add styled detail summary lines

Replace manual focused/unfocused border and title style selection with
the semantic_panel_block helper across graph detail, history, list, and
detail panels. Add styled_detail_summary_line() which renders status,
priority, state, and other metadata fields as colored semantic chips
instead of plain text. Introduce tone_for_status/state/priority helpers
for consistent semantic coloring. Update command hint rendering to use
push_chip with SemanticTone::Accent. Update header rendering to use
build_header_text with chip-based layout (e.g. [Main], [List], [sort ...]).
Update tests to match new chip-wrapped output format.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
